overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a player character in ornate golden armor exploring a desolate fantasy wasteland at night. The character walks through tall grey grass past massive stone monuments with embedded skeletons under a dark sky filled with falling red embers.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy wasteland with giant fungal growths and ancient castle ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward a large stone pillar with an embedded skeleton while observing the castle ruins in the distance

entered.detail: large fortress-like structure perched on a rocky hill in the background
massive red mushroom-like structures with white spots growing on the hillside
tall stone monument with a skeletal figure embedded in its surface
leafless twisted trees scattered across the rocky terrain

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a desolate grassland with massive red fungal growths on the left and ancient castle ruins visible in the far distance. The camera follows as the character approaches a large stone pillar containing an embedded skeleton, walking steadily through the tall grey grass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with distant stone ruins

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass away from the stone structure toward distant ruins on the horizon

entered.detail: dense grey-white tall grass covering the ground
scattered stone structures and broken walls visible on the horizon
large tree with golden-yellow glowing foliage

segments.scene_description: Leaving the initial stone structure behind, the character traverses a vast open field of tall grey grass. The castle and fungal growths fade into the distance as scattered stone ruins and a distinctive golden tree become visible on the horizon ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone monolith with embedded giant skeleton

events.description: character stops walking to look up at the massive stone monolith and its embedded skeleton

agents.ego_description: approaching a massive stone monolith and looking up at the giant skeleton embedded within it

entered.detail: massive vertical stone pillar with intricate carvings and weathered surface
giant skeletal remains fused into the stone structure with glowing red embers nearby
ruined archway structure standing alone in the field

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an imposing tall stone monolith featuring a giant embedded skeleton. The camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the monument against the starry night sky filled with falling red embers, then circles around the base before continuing onward.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined stone structures in grassy wasteland

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk through the field past scattered stone ruins and pillars

entered.detail: broken stone walls and foundations scattered across the landscape
vertical stone columns rising from the ground

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the monolith, the character continues exploring the desolate landscape, passing scattered stone ruins and broken pillars. The journey proceeds through the grey grass toward more distant structures under the perpetually dark, ember-filled sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate wasteland that shifts from a landscape of fungal growths and ruins toward a horizon dominated by a distant golden tree. It begins in a grassland with massive red fungal growths and far-off castle ruins, following the character as they pass a stone pillar containing an embedded skeleton. As the character traverses the vast field of tall grey grass, the initial ruins fade away and the scene opens up to reveal a distinctive golden tree on the horizon. The camera then approaches an imposing stone monolith with a giant embedded skeleton, tilting upward to capture its full height against a starry night sky filled with falling red embers before circling the base. Finally, the movement continues away from the monument, passing scattered broken pillars and ruins as the journey proceeds deeper into the dark, ember-filled landscape.
